pos: the dog barked at the mailman this morning.
i saw a cat sleeping on the warm windowsill.
an owl hooted softly outside my bedroom window.
we caught a huge salmon down by the river.
my sister wants a pet rabbit for her birthday.
the horses grazed quietly in the open field.
a tiny spider crawled across the kitchen floor.
our neighbor's parrot keeps repeating my name.
the cows lined up near the fence at sunset.
i fed the goldfish before i left for work.
a deer wandered into our backyard last night.
the puppy chewed up my favorite pair of shoes.
bees buzzed around the flowers all afternoon.
she rescued a stray kitten from the storm.
the frogs croaked loudly after the heavy rain.
a squirrel buried its acorns under the tree.
my dog loves chasing the ball in the park.
the chickens woke us up far too early today.
a butterfly landed gently on my open hand.
we watched dolphins jumping near the boat.
the old cat stretched and yawned on the sofa.
a hawk circled high above the quiet meadow.
the sheep huddled together against the cold wind.
i heard a mouse scratching inside the wall.
the goat tried to eat my hat at the farm.
turtles sunbathed lazily on the smooth rocks.
my brother is afraid of the big black snake.
the ducks paddled across the calm pond.
a friendly dolphin swam right beside us.
the pig rolled happily in the muddy puddle.
we saw a fox dart across the empty road.
the canary sang sweetly in its little cage.
a whale surfaced just beyond the breaking waves.
the kittens played with a tangled ball of yarn.
i spotted a rabbit hopping through the garden.
the donkey brayed loudly when it got hungry.
a colorful fish darted between the coral reefs.
the wolf howled somewhere deep in the forest.
our cat brought a dead bird to the doorstep.
the busy ants marched along the garden path.

The kitchen smelled wonderful after we made soup.
Please remember to lock the door when you leave.

The library closes early on Sunday afternoons.
I bought a new jacket because the old one tore.
We watched the fireworks from the rooftop terrace.
Maria sang a beautiful song at the school concert.
The bakery on Main Street sells the best muffins.
He spent the whole evening reading by the fireplace.
Our flight to Chicago leaves at seven in the morning.
The children built a tall sandcastle near the shore.
I forgot where I parked the car at the mall.
Emily planted tomatoes and peppers in the backyard.
The meeting ran longer than anyone had expected.
We painted the bedroom a soft shade of blue.
Thomas repaired the broken chair with some glue.
The snow fell gently across the empty parking lot.
I made a cup of tea and sat by the window.
Our team won the championship game last night.
She wrapped the presents in bright silver paper.
The old clock in the hallway stopped working today.
We drove past the lake on our way to the city.
Ben learned to play the guitar over the summer.
The recipe calls for two cups of flour and sugar.
I finally organized all the books on the shelf.
Anna wrote a long letter to her old friend.
The streets were quiet during the early morning hours.
We grabbed lunch at a small café near the office.
The storm knocked out the power for several hours.
Michael cleaned the windows until they sparkled.
art_a: The sentence is written entirely in lowercase.
